name: The Lofts at NoHo Commons
notes: The Lofts at Noho recently went under a $9 million renovation. This includes upgrades to EV charging spots, extensive murals, new signage, landscape, hardscape, and updating 85 percent of the interior market rate units.  The unit mix includes 251 studios and 41 one-bedroom units. Of the total unit count, 28 have been set aside as affordable. Nine units are available to households earning at or below 110 percent of the area median income (AMI), 14 are available at 60 percent of AMI, and five are available at 50 percent of AMI.
